#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    // Make a non-const copy of the buffer to use with buffer_adaptor
    std::vector<uint8_t> non_const_buffer = buffer;
    
    // Create a buffer_adaptor instance
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);
    
    // Check if the requested bytes_to_peek is within the available data
    if (bytes_to_peek > adaptor.size()) {
        HEXI_THROW(std::runtime_error("Peek request exceeds available data"));
    }
    
    // Create a destination vector of the required size
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_peek);
    
    // Use the copy() method to copy data without advancing the read pointer
    adaptor.copy(dest.data(), bytes_to_peek);
    
    return dest;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    // Create a hexi::buffer_adaptor object from the input vector (using const_cast to remove constness)
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>&> adaptor(const_cast<const std::vector<uint8_t>&>(buffer));
    // Call the read_ptr() method on the adaptor object
    return adaptor.read_ptr();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    // Create a hexi::buffer_adaptor object from the input vector
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>&> adaptor(buffer);
    // Call the write_ptr() method on the adaptor object
    return adaptor.write_ptr();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    // Create a hexi::buffer_adaptor object from the input vector (using const_cast to remove constness)
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>&> adaptor(const_cast<const std::vector<uint8_t>&>(buffer));
    // Call size() method to get readable size
    size_t readable_size = adaptor.size();
    // Call free() method to get free space
    size_t free_space = adaptor.free();
    // Return BufferInfo struct with these values
    return BufferInfo{readable_size, free_space};
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the provided buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    // Create a binary_stream using the buffer_adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Check available space: buffer size must be at least the required size
    const auto required_size = sizeof(header) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    if (buffer.size() < required_size) {
        return false;
    }

    // Write the header
    stream << header;

    // Write the items vector using write_container
    stream.write_container(items);

    // Check the stream state to determine success
    return stream.good();
}
```

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    const auto required_size = sizeof(header) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);

}

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the entire vector's data to the buffer
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a vector to hold the read data
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_read);
    
    // Read the specified number of bytes from the buffer into the vector
    buffer.read(result.data(), bytes_to_read);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>
